creator: seschwar@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 187610
Patch for py-khal-0.9.8

The attached patch updates the port to the latest version.

Apart from the version bump the dependencies have been updated.  The port also requires Python 3 now.

The outputs of both `portlint` and `poudriere testport` on FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE amd64 are clean.

Note that port-mgmt/poudriere 3.1.* currently doesn't build this due https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/pull/314. The fix for that (https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/pull/483) is available in port-mgmt/poudriere-devel though.
